chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.D-4149 of 2024 (Mst. Asia Begum and another v. Province of Sindh and others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURES OF JUDGES 1. For order on Misc. No.19470/2024 2. For order on office objection No.01 & 2 3. For order on Misc. No.18288/2024 4. For order on Misc. No. 18289/2024 5. For order on Misc. No. 18290/2024 6. For hearing of main case 16.10.2024 Mr. Tariq Hussain, advocates for the petitioners --------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4-6. The petitioners, by way of the instant petition, have sought demolition of the structure on the subject plot under the deception that it has been raised illegally and without authorization. It is inter alia stated by the petitioners in the petition that they have sold the subject plot to the private respondents, they have violated the terms of agreement on account of their failure to pay the balance consideration to them, a civil suit has also been filed by them wherein they have prayed for demolition of the construction raised on the subject plot. Narration so made in the petition by the petitioners suggests that there is dispute between the parties over the contractual obligations; such dispute the petitioners are intending to get resolved by seeking direction from this Court for demolition of the structure on the subject plot under the deception that it has been raised illegally. Even otherwise, the dispute between the parties involving a factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction; consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine.

Even otherwise, the dispute between the parties involving a factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction; consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE
